series.title: Kutch Digital Map: A Community Discovery Engine

videos.title: Why I Built a Local Business Directory for Kutch in 3 Hours

full_script.hook: Three hours. One sitting. No frameworks, no team, no pitch deck. That's how Kutch Digital Map came together.
full_script.context: Kutch Digital Map is a local business discovery engine built specifically for businesses in the Kutch region of Gujarat. Most regional maps tell you where a business is, but they don't tell you what they actually do.
full_script.repo_explanation: I built this using a community-driven repository. Every business listed including photos and service catalogs. It's about bridging the digital gap for the 200 businesses on my street that have no digital presence.
full_script.decision_moment: We've mapped over 130 businesses across five key sectors. Now, I want to show you exactly how each sector works and how we verify these listings. Which category do you want to explore first?
full_script.options_narration: Option A: Salons & Boutiques. Option B: CAs & Accounts. Option C: Photography & Events. Option D: IT & Tech. Option E: PG & Hostels.
full_script.outro: Choose a category to see the businesses and the impact.

decision_point.question: Which business category do you want to explore?

videos.title: Salons & Boutiques: The Heart of Kutch Style

full_script.hook: Style in Kutch isn't about trends; it's about heritage and community. Our first 30 listings are all about Salons and Boutiques.
full_script.context: From Rann Glow Salon to Shrutu Beauty Studio, these businesses are the backbones of local style. We’ve cataloged their services—Haircut, Facial, Bridal Makeup—so people know what to expect.
full_script.repo_explanation: Many of these businesses had photos on Google Maps they hadn't even uploaded themselves. We're giving them a curated home.
full_script.decision_moment: How do we make sure a listing like a salon is actually owned by the person claiming it? It’s all in the verification.
full_script.options_narration: Option A: See how UTR Verification works. Option B: Explore another category.
full_script.outro: Verification is the bridge between a listing and a business.

decision_point.question: Want to see how we verify these businesses?

videos.title: UTR Verification: The Trust Layer of Kutch Digital Map

full_script.hook: A 12-digit number that changes everything. That's the UTR code.
full_script.context: We don’t just let anyone claim a listing. We require a Unique Transaction Reference from a real financial trace. This keeps the data grounded and the ownership verified.
full_script.repo_explanation: The flow is simple: Claim -> Pay a verification fee -> Provide UTR -> Ownership Granted. It’s a trust mechanism for the real world.
full_script.decision_moment: Now that you see the trust layer, do you want to see the website templates we offer for these verified businesses?
full_script.options_narration: Option A: See the 3 Website Templates. Option B: Back to Directory.
full_script.outro: Templates are the final piece of the digital presence.

decision_point.question: Ready to see the website templates?
